name: ripscloud
description: Rips Cloud — multi-tenant manager over the Colombian Ministry FEV RIPS / SISPRO upstream. Deployed on Cloudflare Workers + Pages.

scripts.clean: find . -name 'node_modules' -prune -not -path './.git/*' | xargs rm -rf && find . -name 'dist' -prune -not -path './.git/*' -not -path './node_modules/*' | xargs rm -rf && find . -name '.turbo' -prune -not -path './.git/*' | xargs rm -rf && find . -name '.wrangler' -prune -not -path './.git/*' | xargs rm -rf
